briefdescription.para: This typedef describes PHY LANES.
This typedef describes PHY RATE.
This typedef describes PHY Training Pattern.
This typedef describes PHY VSWING Level.
This typedef describes PHY PREEMP Level.
This typedef describes PHY XMIT ENABLE.
This typedef describes PHY BUSY.
This typedef describes PHY POWERDOWN CTRL.
This typedef describes PHY POWERDOWN CTRL.
This typedef enumerates the list of training states used in the state machine during the link training process.
This typedef describes Pixels per Clk.
This typedef gets Video Input mapping.
This typedef gets Audio Interface mapping.
This typedef gets Audio Data Width mapping.
This typedef gets Audio Num Channels mapping.
This typedef gets Audio Clk Multiplier Freq mapping.
This function initializes the configuration for the XMmiDp Instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
sets the base address of the DP instance

briefdescription.para: This function Initializes the XMmiDp Instance structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function issues a write request over the AUX channel that will write to the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) address space.

detaileddescription.para: The write message will be divided into multiple transactions which write a maximum of 16 bytes each.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the starting address to write to the RX device.
is the number of bytes to write to the RX device.
is a pointer to the data buffer that contains the data to be written to the RX device.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the AUX write request was successfully acknowledged.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the AUX request timed out.

briefdescription.para: This function issues a read request over the AUX channel that will read from the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) address space.

detaileddescription.para: The read message will be divided into multiple transactions which read a maximum of 16 bytes each.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the starting address to read from the RX device.
is the number of bytes to read from the RX device.
is a pointer to the data buffer that will be filled with read data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the AUX read request was successfully acknowledged.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the AUX request timed out.

briefdescription.para: This function performs an I2C write over the AUX channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address on the I2C bus of the target device.
is the number of bytes to write.
is a pointer to a buffer which will be used as the data source for the write.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the I2C write has successfully completed with no errors.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the AUX request timed out.

memberdef.argsstring: (XMmiDp *InstancePtr, u32 I2cAddr, u16 Offset, u32 Bytes, void *Data)
memberdef.name: XMmiDp_I2cRead

briefdescription.para: This function performs an I2C read over the AUX channel.

detaileddescription.para:
The read message will be divided into multiple transactions if the requested data spans multiple segments. The segment pointer is automatically incremented and the offset is calibrated as needed. E.g. For an overall offset of:
128, an I2C read is done on segptr=0; offset=128.
256, an I2C read is done on segptr=1; offset=0.
384, an I2C read is done on segptr=1; offset=128.
512, an I2C read is done on segptr=2; offset=0.
etc.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address on the I2C bus of the target device.
is the offset at specified address of targeted I2C device that the read will start from.
is the number of bytes to read.
is a pointer to a buffer that will be filled with the I2C read data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the I2C write has successfully completed with no errors.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the AUX request timed out.

memberdef.argsstring: (XMmiDp *InstancePtr, u32 RegOffset, u32 Mask, u32 Shift, u32 Val)
memberdef.name: XMmiDp_RegReadModifyWrite

briefdescription.para: This helper api reads value from register, computes the new value and writes to the register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
offset to read/write values
value
value
to be written

memberdef.argsstring: (XMmiDp *InstancePtr, u32 RegOffset, u32 Mask, u32 Shift, u32 Val)
memberdef.name: XMmiDp_DpcdReadModifyWrite

briefdescription.para: This helper api reads value from DPCD, computes the new value and writes to the DPCD register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
offset to read/write values
value
value
to be written

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if AUX read and write both succeed.
Error code propagated from XMmiDp_AuxRead() on read failure.
Error code propagated from XMmiDp_AuxWrite() on write failure.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the number of lanes to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the number of lanes to be used over the main link.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the data rate to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

is the link rate to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_162GBPS = 0x06 (for a 1.62 Gbps data rate)
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_270GBPS = 0x0A (for a 2.70 Gbps data rate)
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_540GBPS = 0x14 (for a 5.40 Gbps data rate)
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_810GBPS = 0x1E (for a 8.10 Gbps data rate)

briefdescription.para: This function sets the training pattern to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

select to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects: XMMIDP_PHY_NO_TRAIN = 0x0, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS1 = 0x1, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS2 = 0x2, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS3 = 0x3, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS4 = 0x4, XMMIDP_PHY_SYMBOL_ERR_RATE = 0x5, XMMIDP_PHY_PRBS7 = 0x6, XMMIDP_PHY_CUSTOMPAT = 0x7, XMMIDP_PHY_CP2520_PAT_1 = 0x8, XMMIDP_PHY_CP2520_PAT_2 = 0x9,

briefdescription.para: This function sets the VoltageSwing levels in the DisplayPort TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

for each lane to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL0
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL1
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL2
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL3

briefdescription.para: This function sets the VoltagePreEmphasis levels for the DisplayPort TX PHY.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

for each lane to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:
XMMIDP_PHY_PREEMP_LEVEL0
XMMIDP_PHY_PREEMP_LEVEL1
XMMIDP_PHY_PREEMP_LEVEL2
XMMIDP_PHY_PREEMP_LEVEL3

briefdescription.para: This function enables phy transfer for lanes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables phy transfer for lanes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables phy scrambler over the main link through CCTL register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disable phy scrambler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function does a PHY Soft reset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the type of reset to assert.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SSC on the PHY.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables SSC on the PHY.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for the DisplayPort PHY to come out of reset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

listitem.para: XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if the PHY failed to be ready.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the phy powerdown control val.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
val is the link rate to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:

briefdescription.para: This function sets the phy width control val.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
width val to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:

briefdescription.para: This function sets the AUX_250US_CNT_LIMIT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
250Us count limit

briefdescription.para: This function sets the AUX_2000US_CNT_LIMIT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
2000Us count limit

briefdescription.para: This function sets the AUX_100000US_CNT_LIMIT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
100000Us count limit

briefdescription.para: This function sets PM_COFIG1 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets PM_COFIG2 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disables runtime AUX debug prints.

parameterdescription.para: is 1 to enable debug prints, 0 to disable.

briefdescription.para: Performs an AUX soft reset by toggling the AUX reset bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: Resets Controller, HDCP, Audio Sampler, and AUX blocks.

detaileddescription.para: PHY and Video stream resets are intentionally excluded.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if there is a connected RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for when a hpd irq event interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for when a hpd hotplug interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for when a hpd hot unplug interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is the HPD Event interrupt handler for the XMmiDp driver.

detaileddescription.para: When an interrupt happens, it first detects what kind of interrupt happened, then decides which callback function to invoke.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the top-level general interrupt handler for the XMmiDp driver.

detaileddescription.para: It reads the GENERAL_INTERRUPT register, dispatches HPD events to XMmiDp_HpdInterruptHandler, and clears all pending event bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function clears XMMIDP_GENERAL_INT0 HPD_EVENT bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves connected RX devices Extended Display Identification given the block number.

detaileddescription.para: A block num of 0 represents the base EDID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is a pointer to the data buffer to save the block data to
is the EDID block number to retrieve.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the block read has successfully completed with no errors.
XST_ERROR_COUNT_MAX if a time out occurred while attempting to read the requested block.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.

briefdescription.para: This function enables XMMIDP_GENERAL_INTERRUPT_0 bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to enable

briefdescription.para: This function disables XMMIDP_GENERAL_INTERRUPT_0 bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to disable

briefdescription.para: This function enables XMMIDP_HPD_INTERRUPT_ENABLE bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to enable

briefdescription.para: This function disables XMMIDP_HPD_INTERRUPT_ENABLE bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to disable

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDP_STATUS_ENABLE bits based on the mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
specifies the interrupt bits to enable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the number of lanes to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the number of lanes to be used over the main link.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the dpcd link bw to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

is the link rate to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_162GBPS = 0x06 (for a 1.62 Gbps data rate)
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_270GBPS = 0x0A (for a 2.70 Gbps data rate)
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_540GBPS = 0x14 (for a 5.40 Gbps data rate)
XMMIDP_LINK_BW_SET_810GBPS = 0x1E (for a 8.10 Gbps data rate)

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DPCD Link qual_0 training pattern to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

select to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects: XMMIDP_PHY_NO_TRAIN = 0x0, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS1 = 0x1, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS2 = 0x2, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS3 = 0x3, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS4 = 0x4, XMMIDP_PHY_SYMBOL_ERR_RATE = 0x5, XMMIDP_PHY_PRBS7 = 0x6, XMMIDP_PHY_CUSTOMPAT = 0x7, XMMIDP_PHY_CP2520_PAT_1 = 0x8, XMMIDP_PHY_CP2520_PAT_2 = 0x9,

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DPCD training pattern to be used by the main link for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

select to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects: XMMIDP_PHY_NO_TRAIN = 0x0, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS1 = 0x1, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS2 = 0x2, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS3 = 0x3, XMMIDP_PHY_TPS4 = 0x4, XMMIDP_PHY_SYMBOL_ERR_RATE = 0x5, XMMIDP_PHY_PRBS7 = 0x6, XMMIDP_PHY_CUSTOMPAT = 0x7, XMMIDP_PHY_CP2520_PAT_1 = 0x8, XMMIDP_PHY_CP2520_PAT_2 = 0x9,

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DPCD VoltageSwing levels int the DisplayPort TX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

for each lane to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL0
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL1
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL2
XMMIDP_PHY_VSWING_LEVEL3

briefdescription.para: This function sets the DPCD VoltagePreEmphasis levels for the DisplayPort TX PHY.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

for each lane to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:
PHYPREEMP_LEVEL0
PHYPREEMP_LEVEL1
PHYPREEMP_LEVEL2
PHYPREEMP_LEVEL3

briefdescription.para: This function gets the max lane count supported from DPCD.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the max link rate supported from Rx DPCD register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DPCD Rx Field.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Training Aux Read Interval register of sink DPCD.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will do a burst AUX read from the RX device over the AUX channel.

detaileddescription.para: The contents of the status registers will be stored for later use by XDp_TxCheckClockRecovery, XDp_TxCheckChannelEqualization, and XDp_TxAdjVswingPreemp.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the AUX read was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function reads MST_CAP from Rx DPCD register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables fast link training in the core controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
width val to be used over the main link based on one of the following selects:

briefdescription.para: This function disables fast link training in the core controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates link training sequence with the Rx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures CCTL enhance framing enable bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures CCTL enhance framing enable bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the training aux interval.

detaileddescription.para: The lowest time is 400us. All other WaitTimes are direct multiples of lowest time and value read from DPCD register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) indicates that the clock recovery sequence during link training was successful - the RX device's link clock and data recovery unit has realized and maintained the frequency lock for all lanes currently in use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the number of lanes to check.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device's clock recovery PLL has achieved frequency lock for all lanes in use.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the adjusted voltage swing and pre-emphasis level settings from the Rx DPCD register and modify the drive settings accordingly during link training.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if writing the settings was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the training pattern to be used during link training for both the DisplayPort TX core and the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
selects the pattern to be used.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setting the pattern was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function sets current voltage swing and pre-emphasis level settings from the LinkConfig structure to Phy and DPCD.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is a pointer to the array used for preparing a burst write over the AUX channel.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if writing the settings was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Rx Dpcd link rate as well as Phy link rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
value to program.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Rx Dpcd lane count as well as Phy lane count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
value to program.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the clock recovery sequence as part of link training.

detaileddescription.para:
The sequence is as follows: 0) Start signaling at the minimum voltage swing, pre-emphasis, and post- cursor levels. 1) Transmit training pattern 1 over the main link with symbol scrambling disabled. 2) The clock recovery loop. If clock recovery is unsuccessful after MaxIterations loop iterations, return. 2a) Wait for at least the period of time specified in the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) register, TRAINING_AUX_RD_INTERVAL. 2b) Check if all lanes have achieved clock recovery lock. If so, return. 2c) Check if the same voltage swing level has been used 5 consecutive times or if the maximum level has been reached. If so, return. 2d) Adjust the voltage swing, pre-emphasis, and post-cursor levels as requested by the RX device. 2e) Loop back to 2a.
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XDp instance.
The next training state:
XMMIDP__TS_CHANNEL_EQUALIZATION if the clock recovery sequence completed successfully.
XMMIDP__TS_FAILURE if writing the drive settings to the RX device was unsuccessful.
XMMIDP__TS_ADJUST_LINK_RATE if the clock recovery sequence did not complete successfully.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function is reached if either the clock recovery or the channel equalization process failed during training.

detaileddescription.para: As a result, the data rate will be downshifted, and training will be re-attempted (starting with clock recovery) at the reduced data rate. If the data rate is already at 1.62 Gbps, a downshift in lane count will be attempted.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para:
The next training state:
XMMIDP_TS_ADJUST_LANE_COUNT if the minimal data rate is already in use. Re-attempt training at a reduced lane count.
XMMIDP_TS_CLOCK_RECOVERY otherwise. Re-attempt training.

briefdescription.para: This function is reached if either the clock recovery or the channel equalization process failed during training, and a minimal data rate of 1.62 Gbps was being used.

detaileddescription.para: As a result, the number of lanes in use will be reduced, and training will be re-attempted (starting with clock recovery) at this lower lane count.

simplesect.para: Training will be re-attempted with the maximum data rate being used with the reduced lane count to train at the main link at the maximum bandwidth possible.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para:
The next training state:
XMMIDP_TS_FAILURE if only one lane is already in use.
XMMIDP_TS_CLOCK_RECOVERY otherwise. Re-attempt training.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Rx DPCD MaxDownspread register bits.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Rx DPCD revision number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function reads Rx DPCD capability registers to initiate link training.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the training process succeeded.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) indicates that the channel equalization sequence during link training was successful - the RX device has achieved channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment for all lanes currently in use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the number of lanes to check.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device has achieved channel equalization symbol lock, and interlane alignment for all lanes in use.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the channel equalization sequence as part of link training.

detaileddescription.para: The sequence is as follows: 0) Start signaling with the same drive settings used at the end of the clock recovery sequence. 1) Transmit training pattern 2 (or 3) over the main link with symbol scrambling disabled. 2) The channel equalization loop. If channel equalization is unsuccessful after 5 loop iterations, return. 2a) Wait for at least the period of time specified in the RX device's DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) register, TRAINING_AUX_RD_INTERVAL. 2b) Check if all lanes have achieved channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment. If so, return. 2c) Check if the same voltage swing level has been used 5 consecutive times or if the maximum level has been reached. If so, return. 2d) Adjust the voltage swing, pre-emphasis, and post-cursor levels as requested by the RX device. 2e) Loop back to 2a. For a more detailed description of the channel equalization sequence, see section 3.5.1.2.2 of the DisplayPort 1.4a specification document.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para:
The next training state:
XDP_TX_TS_SUCCESS if training succeeded.
XDP_TX_TS_FAILURE if writing the drive settings to the RX device was unsuccessful.
XDP_TX_TS_ADJUST_LINK_RATE if, after 5 loop iterations, the channel equalization sequence did not complete successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the Rx DisplayPort Configuration Data (DPCD) indicates the receiver has achieved and maintained clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment for all lanes currently in use.The DP 1.4 spec specifies checking for the above bits max 5 times before retraining link at lower link rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the number of lanes to check.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the RX device has maintained clock recovery, channel equalization, symbol lock, and interlane alignment.
XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if no RX device is connected.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the link training process.

detaileddescription.para: It is implemented as a state machine, with each state returning the next state. First, the clock recovery sequence will be run; if successful, the channel equalization sequence will run. If either the clock recovery or channel equalization sequence failed, the link rate or the number of lanes used will be reduced and training will be re-attempted. If training fails at the minimal data rate, 1.62 Gbps with a single lane, training will no longer re-attempt and fail.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the training process succeeded.

briefdescription.para: This function is the delay/sleep function for the XMmiDp driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the number of microseconds to delay/sleep for.

briefdescription.para: This function disables video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function enabless video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function clears MSA values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function clears out Video Config Register values.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video input polarity control.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config1 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config2 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config3 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config4 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video config5 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the vsample register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video msa1 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video msa2 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video msa3 register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets video HBlankInterval register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This is helper api that programs the VideoController MSA, VideoConfig registers for a specific stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This is helper api that clears the VideoController MSA, VideoConfig registers for a specific stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the bits per color value of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
is the new number of bits per color to use.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the pixel mode of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video format of the video stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
input mapping.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the video stream to enable or disable.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
or Disable.

briefdescription.para: Computes the MSA Misc0 field from the stream's BitsPerColor and the supplied color format, and stores the result in MsaConfig[Stream].Misc0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2).

briefdescription.para: Computes the HBlankInterval register value from the stream's HBlank, BitsPerColor, and the supplied color format, and stores the result in MsaConfig[Stream].HBlankInterval.

detaileddescription.para: HBlankInterval = HBlank (pixels) x BytesPerPixel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2/4:2:0).

briefdescription.para: Computes AvgBytesPerTu, AvgBytesPerTuFrac, InitThreshold, and InitThresholdHi for the VIDEO_CONFIG5 register using the stream's pixel clock, color depth, link config, and blanking parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2/4:2:0).

memberdef.argsstring: (XMmiDp *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, u8 Stream, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat)
memberdef.name: XMmiDp_SetVidControllerUseStdVidMode

briefdescription.para: Configures the video controller with standard video mode timing parameters including HActive, VActive, sync widths, blanking intervals, pixel clock, and dynamically computed MSA and transfer unit parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the standard video mode to configure.
is the stream ID (XMMIDP_STREAM_ID1..ID4).
is the color format (RGB, YCbCr 4:4:4/4:2:2/4:2:0).

briefdescription.para: This function programs DpTx Audio Controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio stream interface.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
interface I2S or SPDIF .

briefdescription.para: This function sets the active audio data input.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
data input on different channels.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio data width val(16 bit - 24 bit).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
Data Width.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio input is operating in HBR mode or not.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
HBR mode en or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the audio num of channels used.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
num channels

briefdescription.para: This function controls the audio mute flag in VB-ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
mute clear or set

briefdescription.para: This function defines first byte of audio SDP and audio timestamp SDP header.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
Packet Id

briefdescription.para: This function defines audio timestamp version num.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
timestamp version number

briefdescription.para: This function defines audio clock frequency multiplier in relation to audio sample rate Fs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
clock frequency multiplier

briefdescription.para: This function programs the AUDIO_CONFIG1 registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio timestamp for sdp vertical ctrl.

detaileddescription.para: When set, dptx sends out audio timestamp SDP once every video frame during vertical blanking period.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
timestamp sdp enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio stream during vertical blanking .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
stream enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP to be sent out during vertical intervals using data from SDP_REGISTER_BANK .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
SDP during vertical intervals.

briefdescription.para: This function sets 128 bytes of SDP by using SDP_REGISTER_BANK 1,2,3 and 4.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
128BytesSdp.

briefdescription.para: This function disables external SDP when set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
external SDP.

briefdescription.para: This function sets scheduler searches for next SDP to transmit based on fixed priority.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
fixed priority SDP scheduler.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the SDP_VERTICAL_CTRL registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio timestamp for sdp horizontal ctrl.

detaileddescription.para: When set, dptx sends out audio timestamp SDP once every video frame during horizontal blanking period.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
timestamp sdp enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function enables audio stream during horizontal blanking .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
stream enable/disable.

briefdescription.para: This function sets SDP to be sent out during horizontal intervals using data from SDP_REGISTER_BANK .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
SDP during horizontal intervals.

briefdescription.para: This function sets scheduler searches for next SDP to transmit based on fixed priority.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
fixed priority SDP scheduler.

briefdescription.para: This function programs the SDP_HORIZONTAL_CTRL registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Scramble control for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the enhanced framing control for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the enhanced framing control with FEC feature for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets default fast link training for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function scales down debounce filter on HPD input for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function disables SPD nibble interleaving DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable or disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets aux reply timeout to either 400us or 3.2ms DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
for 400us, 0x1 for 3.2ms

briefdescription.para: This function enables MST mode for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function enables FEC feature for DpTx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets DpTx in eDP mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function use in MST mode only triggers link to start ACT sequence with DpRx of branch.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
is the stream number for which to set the color depth.
enable/disable

briefdescription.para: This function sets the core controller register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.
is the stream number for which to enable or disable video stream.

briefdescription.para: This function enables mst act seq in the core controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables mst mode in the core controller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for VC_PAYLOAD_TABLE_UPDATE status bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: status. This ensures successful update of VC_PAYLOAD_TABLE.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function waits for ACT_Handled status bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: status. This ensures successful handling of ACT trigger.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates CCTL ACT sequence between DpTx and DpRx of the immediate branch device connected.

detaileddescription.para: Check DPCD Payload table update status. This ensures successful handling of ACT trigger sequence.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the virtual channel payload allocation table.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XMmiDp instance.
Payload slot for each stream

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ck 03/14/25 Initial Release.
